title: MYLP's Create
description:
Create focused Modpack of the MYLP Group. Early state, changes all the time, but it works.
A mix of mostly exploration- and techmods
body:
# Magic meets Industry, Adventure meets Expansion 

This modpack is primarily intended to contain as much Create mod content as possible, build industries, automate all the item your heart desires, turn mountain ranges into a super flat world and more. However so much of the same might be to bland for some people, this is why it is packed with mods to improve your rpg experience, from a proximity voice chat to dungeons, from a new arsenal of weapons to an onslaught of magic this modpack has it all. 


# Exploration 

Bored of traveling the world on foot or using an elytra? We've got you covered, build your own airships weaponize them with cannons or create your own mobile superbase, the options are endless with the help of Valkyrien skies and extras. 


# Server Usage

You need to remove following mods on a Server for it to work:
- Embedium 
- Itemlocks
- Occulus


# Early Build 

This modpack is currently in a pretty early stage, mods and all are in a state I'm somewhat happy with however balancing and mods interacting with each other need a lot of work, ~~feel free to state your thoughts on what should be adjusted~~ (currently not set up).

# Credits
